title: Red-Pen Social Profile Commentary
input: A screenshot of a social-media profile or post
prompt: Transform the supplied social-media screenshot into a photographed paper printout with subtle shadows, gentle paper texture, and a believable printed surface. Add abundant handwritten Chinese commentary and doodles in red ballpoint pen, reacting to details that are actually visible in the screenshot.

annotation_style.tone: Write like a witty friend or teacher commenting in the margin: humorous, exaggerated, observant, and a little sharp, but never cruel or personally abusive.
annotation_style.layout: Make the page look casually messy yet visually guided, as though it was improvised by hand while still emphasizing the funniest or most important details.

safety_and_quality: Do not invent private facts about the account owner.
Do not target protected traits, appearance, disability, or other sensitive characteristics.
Avoid threats, harassment, slurs, or humiliating personal attacks.
Keep usernames and original interface details legible unless the user asks for anonymization.
expected_result: A believable paper-print effect covered with funny red-pen reactions, with energetic visual clutter, clear focal points, and the charm of spontaneous margin notes.
